reviews.comment:
Es la única ypf con baños horribles de sucios!!!! Se nota que no los controlan en todo el día por la cantidad de papeles.  Es temporada baja. Y es un pueblo chico.  Y eso que viajo bastante por todos lados y esta es un desastre!!!! Ni ganas de comer ahí.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only YPF gas station with horribly filthy bathrooms! You can tell they don't clean them all day because of all the toilet paper. It's low season. And it's a small town. And I travel quite a bit, and this place is a disaster! I wouldn't even want to eat there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJMWE3STNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de las chicas del full,pero ni se te ocurra pedir factura A o C después de las 15hs,xq las retan a las empleadas...una vergüenza la administrativo/a q le cuesta confeccionar una factura q x Ley debe entregar 👎👎👎

(Translated by Google)
Good service from the girls at the full, but don't even think about asking for an A or C invoice after 3 p.m., because they scold the employees... it's a disgrace for the administrative staff who struggles to prepare an invoice that they must submit by law 👎👎👎
